summary: Completed comprehensive testing of authentication system and private trip functionality. All backend APIs working correctly with proper authentication protection. Frontend UI correctly implements role-based access control and workflow enforcement.
passed_tests: Owner login with seeded credentials from test_credentials.md
Invalid login properly rejected with appropriate error messages
Admin user management API endpoints (list, create, deactivate)
Authenticated analysis with sample files matches baseline (start 10:37, end 13:39, total 182, segments 1)
Private trip override correctly splits segments (manual 12:00-12:30 produces 2 segments, 131 minutes)
Correction text includes private trip exclusion information
Frontend login screen loads and functions correctly
Admin user management UI visible only to owner/admin users
Regular users cannot see or access admin management controls
User creation and deactivation works through UI
Workflow steps properly enforce file upload requirements
Map functionality and UI components load correctly
Role-based UI elements display correctly (badges, user info)
Private trip manager components present and functional

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (authentication, RBAC, and workflow enforcement working correctly)
